name: Crayfish Tail Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the vinaigrette by mixing 1 part vinegar with 4 parts hazelnut oil, mustard, salt, and pepper to taste.
2. Boil the crayfish tails until cooked through, then cool them.
3. In a large bowl, combine the spinach, endive, and blanched beans.
4. Add the diced tomato, shallots, chervil, and tarragon to the bowl.
5. Add the cooked crayfish tails to the mixture and drizzle with the vinaigrette dressing.
6. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the salad.
7. Mix well and set aside.
